notes: Rev A physical schematic target for the VJUGA spin-off.
Core CPU, ROM, DRAM, 8255, and 74xx socket pins are bound to real DIP pin numbers where local KiCad symbols provide authoritative mappings.
GAL/header pins remain design-assigned until equations and connector pinouts are frozen.
Rev A now includes first-pass oscillator, reset, decoupling, bulk capacitance, and VGA series resistor parts.
Keyboard rows have explicit 10k pullups, the 74148 enable is tied active through R15, and PPI column outputs reach J30 through 220 ohm series resistors.
Rev A includes a first-pass diagnostic LED bank for +5V, PWR_OK, CLK, RESET_N, M1_N instruction fetch, and RFSH_N refresh activity.
J30 is a 1x15 inline original-keyboard bring-up header: 8 column wires plus 7 row wires; no keyboard power pins are exported on Rev A.
Rev A power input is simple +5V: J1 screw/header input and J3 USB-C VBUS feed VCC_RAW in parallel before F1; fused VCC powers the board.
USB-C power-only input uses 5.1k Rd resistors on CC1/CC2 so ordinary USB-C supplies provide 5V.
